tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose tolerance or possible diabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and glucose are normal. Recommend clinical correlation for glycemic control and consideration of diabetes management or further evaluation.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
